name: io.github.timjensgrossinger/threnody
title: Threnody
description: Local-first MCP meta-harness: routes, plans, and swarms multi-agent coding work — emitting tier-aware Dynamic Workflows on Claude Code — while the host shell executes via Agent/Task subagents.

environmentVariables.name: THRENODY_ALLOW_NO_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Allow installer/setup to continue with no host AI CLI detected.

environmentVariables.name: THRENODY_SKIP_WIZARD
environmentVariables.description: Skip the interactive first-run wizard (always true on plugin/uvx paths; no TTY).
